hooks.command: echo '[TOKEN SAVE] Consider using codebase-memory MCP tools (search_graph, search_code, trace_path) instead of Grep/Glob. The knowledge graph is faster and uses 99% fewer tokens. Only proceed with Grep/Glob if the graph does not cover this query.'

CMD=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qEi '(rm\s+-rf\s+[/~]|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+push\s+--force|DROP\s+TABLE|DROP\s+DATABASE|kubectl\s+delete|docker\s+system\s+prune\s+-a)'; then echo '[BLOCKED] Destructive command detected. Review carefully before proceeding.' >&2; exit 2; fi

CONTENT=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}); print(d.get('content','') + d.get('new_string',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qEi '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|glpat-[a-zA-Z0-9-]{20}|Bearer\s+[a-zA-Z0-9._-]{20,})'; then echo '[SECRET DETECTED] Possible API key or token in file content. Use environment variables instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); SESSION_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('session_id',''))" 2>/dev/null); TRANSCRIPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('transcript_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); cozempic guard --daemon ${SESSION_ID:+--session $SESSION_ID} 2>/dev/null || true; cozempic digest inject ${TRANSCRIPT:+--session $TRANSCRIPT} 2>/dev/null || true

TRANSCRIPT=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('transcript_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); cozempic checkpoint 2>/dev/null || true; cozempic digest flush ${TRANSCRIPT:+--session $TRANSCRIPT} 2>/dev/null || true
cozempic post-compact 2>/dev/null || true; cozempic digest inject 2>/dev/null || true

TRANSCRIPT=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('transcript_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); cozempic checkpoint 2>/dev/null || true; cozempic digest flush ${TRANSCRIPT:+--session $TRANSCRIPT} 2>/dev/null || true
